Question.Title: What do comments look like in XML?
Question.Answer: Comments in XML begin with <!-- and end with -->. For example: <!-- This is a comment -->.
Question.Constraint: The string "--" (double-hyphen) must not occur within comments.

Question.Title: Can an attribute be repeated in the same element?
Question.OfficialRule: An attribute name must not appear more than once in the same start-tag or empty-element tag.

Question.Title: Where is it stated that tag names must match?
Question.Description: The W3C recommendation states that the Name in the end-tag must match that in the start-tag. XML is case-sensitive, meaning "Tag" and "tag" are different.
